formInstance.inputDocument:
Dear Professional Association Membership Committee,

I am writing to submit my application for membership as an Associate Member of the Professional Association. My name is Brian Hall, and I can be reached at brian.hall@hotmail.com or 555-0123. I was born on February 2, 1982.

I hold a Master's Degree in Software Engineering and have achieved the AWS Certified Developer certification. Currently, I am employed as a Software Developer at Cloud Services, where I have accumulated six years of experience in the technology industry. My background in software engineering and professional certifications make me a valuable asset to the association.

I have chosen to apply for a membership duration of two years to fully engage with the resources and networking opportunities provided by the Professional Association. I believe that being a member will not only enhance my professional development but also allow me to contribute my expertise to the association.

As a colleague of Samantha Young, who can be contacted at samantha.young@hotmail.com, I am confident that she can attest to my dedication and contributions in the field of technology. I value her reference and believe it reflects my commitment to excellence in my work.

I am eager to become a part of the Professional Association and collaborate with fellow members to further advance the industry. Thank you for considering my application, and I look forward to the opportunity to contribute to the association's mission.

Sincerely,
Brian Hall
